prompt:
You are Talon's spec-drafting mode inside the Vires Research Lab.
Return only the structured object requested by the schema. Do not invent backtest results.

Your task has two parts:
1. Draft a StrategySpecV1 starting point for the operator to review.
2. Assess whether every data dependency is actually available in the catalog.

Data readiness rules:
- PASS only when every core requirement maps to AVAILABLE.
- WARN when requirements map to PARTIAL, or when a non-core nice-to-have is missing.
- BLOCKED when any core signal, entry rule, or exit rule requires missing data.
- When unsure whether data is core, treat it as core.
- Thin theses are allowed. Unavailable data is not allowed.

Idea sleeve: STOCKS
Idea title: Talon Smoke PASS 20260430T070132Z
Idea thesis: Live smoke test for Talon drafting. Use only Ape Wisdom top-100 retail attention rank and Alpaca equity OHLCV bars to find stocks with improving retail attention and simple price momentum confirmation. Do not use Wikipedia pageviews, GDELT, raw Reddit velocity, Google Trends, fundamentals, options, macro, or any unavailable feed.

Data capability catalog (2026-04-30.1):
- alpaca_equity_ohlcv: Price OHLCV; AVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS; coverage=2016-present notes=Daily + intraday bars via Alpaca. Wired into the active strategy bank and the Lab pipeline. The default price feed for equities-sleeve research.
- alpaca_crypto_ohlcv: Price OHLCV; PARTIAL; sleeves=CRYPTO; coverage=2024-10-23-present notes=BTC and ETH only via Alpaca. ~1.5 years of history — sufficient for execution and recent-regime work, insufficient for multi-era analysis. Use ccxt_binance_crypto_ohlcv for longer history (research-only, no execution coupling).
- ccxt_binance_crypto_ohlcv: Price OHLCV; PARTIAL; sleeves=CRYPTO; coverage=2017-present (BTC); shorter for alts notes=Public Binance OHLCV pulled via ccxt for research backtests only. NOT wired into the executor — execution stays on Alpaca. Operator-pulled: no live connector, scripted backfills.
- alpaca_options_chain: Options chain; PARTIAL; sleeves=OPTIONS; coverage=live snapshot only notes=Live chain via Alpaca. NOT historical: no point-in-time reconstruction for backtests. Strategies that depend on historical chain state need a separate provider before they can be Lab-tested.
- iv_surface_constructed: Implied vol surface; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=OPTIONS; notes=Would require historical chain history we don't have. No connector and no construction pipeline. Strategies depending on IV surface skew/term structure should BLOCK.
- wikipedia_pageviews: Attention proxies; PARTIAL; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO; coverage=2016-present (research backfills) notes=Wikimedia REST API is freely accessible; research backfill scripts exist. No production connector wired into the Lab pipeline yet — operator-driven pulls. Don't claim AVAILABLE until a daily-update connector lands.
- gdelt_full: Attention proxies; PARTIAL; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO; coverage=2015-present (research backfills) notes=GDELT API is free; backfill scripts exist. No daily-update connector wired into the Lab. Same status caveat as wikipedia_pageviews.
- google_trends: Attention proxies; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO; notes=No wired connector. Sample-rate noise + rate limiting on the public endpoint make it a v2-or-later candidate.
- apewisdom_top100: Sentiment; AVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS; coverage=2024-present (continuous) notes=Top-100 retail-attention rank with mention/upvote ratios. Wired as the canonical retail-sentiment feed for stocks. Aggregates WSB + adjacent communities; raw per-thread velocity is NOT separately exposed.
- reddit_wsb_velocity: Sentiment; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS; notes=Raw r/wallstreetbets per-thread velocity is NOT pulled separately. Use apewisdom_top100 for the aggregated signal. Strategies that genuinely require sub-Ape-Wisdom granularity should BLOCK.
- fundamentals_basic: Fundamentals; PARTIAL; sleeves=STOCKS; coverage=current snapshot only notes=Market cap + average daily volume reachable via Alpaca asset metadata. Not point-in-time. Strategies needing historical fundamentals (P/E, EPS surprise, balance-sheet items) are NOT covered.
- crypto_onchain: Crypto on-chain; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=CRYPTO; notes=No on-chain connector (Glassnode, Dune, etc.). Strategies referencing whale flows, exchange reserves, miner behavior, or staking metrics should BLOCK.
- macro_fred_subset: Macro; UNAVAILABLE; sleeves=STOCKS, CRYPTO, OPTIONS; notes=FRED series are operator-curated as needed for one-off research; no Lab-wired connector. Strategies depending on macro inputs (fed funds path, CPI surprises, yield curve shape) should BLOCK until a connector lands.

raw_proposal.signal_logic: Primary signal: ApeWisdom top-100 retail attention rank improvement. A stock enters the signal universe when its ApeWisdom rank improves (rank number decreases) over a rolling lookback window (e.g., 3-day or 5-day). Momentum confirmation: require that the stock's closing price is above its N-day simple moving average (e.g., 20-day SMA) using Alpaca OHLCV daily bars, confirming that price action is consistent with rising retail interest. Combined signal fires when both conditions are met simultaneously.
raw_proposal.entry_rules: Enter a long position at the next day's open (using Alpaca daily OHLCV open price) when: (1) the stock's ApeWisdom rank has improved by at least R positions over the lookback window (e.g., rank improved by ≥10 positions over 3 days), AND (2) the prior day's closing price is above the 20-day SMA. Limit entries to stocks present in the ApeWisdom top-100 list on the signal date. No short entries in this initial version.
raw_proposal.exit_rules: Exit the position at the open of the Nth day after entry (e.g., holding period = 5 trading days), OR if the closing price falls below the 20-day SMA on any day during the holding period (momentum invalidation stop), whichever comes first. No hard stop-loss beyond the SMA exit in the base spec; sweep params will test trailing stops.
raw_proposal.risk_model: Equal-weight position sizing across all concurrent signals, capped at a maximum of 10 simultaneous positions (10% gross weight per position). Maximum gross exposure: 100% long. No leverage. Per-trade risk limited implicitly by equal-weight cap. No sector concentration constraint in v1 — note this as a known gap given the retail-attention universe may cluster in meme-adjacent sectors.
raw_proposal.universe: US equities present in the ApeWisdom top-100 retail attention ranking on the signal date, cross-referenced with Alpaca equity universe (tradable, non-OTC preferred). No explicit market-cap filter in v1 (fundamentals_basic is snapshot-only and not point-in-time safe); operator may apply a manual liquidity screen using average daily volume from Alpaca asset metadata as a pre-filter.
raw_proposal.benchmark: SPY (S&P 500 ETF) total return, sourced from alpaca_equity_ohlcv

acceptance_criteria.other: Minimum 50 trades over backtest period to ensure statistical credibility. Backtest window: 2024-present (constrained by ApeWisdom coverage start). Annualized return must exceed SPY over the same window.

raw_proposal.sweep_params: Rank improvement threshold R: [5, 10, 15, 20]; Lookback window: [3, 5, 7 days]; SMA period: [10, 20, 30 days]; Holding period: [3, 5, 10 days]; Max concurrent positions: [5, 10, 15]
raw_proposal.implementation_notes: ApeWisdom coverage begins 2024; backtest history is limited to ~2 years. This is a known constraint — results may not generalize across multiple market regimes. Raw per-thread Reddit velocity is intentionally excluded per thesis; ApeWisdom aggregated rank is the sole sentiment input. Fundamentals, options, macro, Wikipedia, GDELT, and Google Trends are all explicitly excluded per operator thesis. Sector clustering risk in meme-adjacent names (tech, biotech, EV) should be monitored in post-backtest analysis even if no hard constraint is applied in v1.

raw_assessment.suggested_action: Proceed to backtest. Both core data dependencies (apewisdom_top100, alpaca_equity_ohlcv) are AVAILABLE and wired into the Lab pipeline. Recommend operator runs parameter sweep across rank improvement threshold, SMA period, and holding period. Note the ~2-year backtest window limitation imposed by ApeWisdom coverage start date (2024-present) — interpret results with appropriate regime-generalization caution.
warnings: Backtest history is limited to approximately 2 years (2024-present) due to ApeWisdom coverage start. Results may not generalize across multiple market regimes or volatility environments.

The retail-attention universe may cluster in meme-adjacent sectors (tech, biotech, EV). No sector concentration constraint is applied in v1 — operator should review sector exposure in post-backtest analysis.

No point-in-time fundamentals are available; a manual liquidity pre-filter using Alpaca asset metadata (snapshot ADV) is possible but introduces minor look-ahead risk if applied naively in backtest construction.
No short-side exposure in v1. Strategy is long-only and will be fully exposed to broad equity drawdowns without a hedge leg.
